notes: Acme Group is migrating to SAP RISE PCE; this engagement covers the SAP technology layer above the RISE line for three years.
assumptions: SAP RISE PCE responsibility split applies; clock-stops apply for ECS-dependent tickets.
Client retains ownership of business processes and master data.
Knowledge transfer from SI vendor in place by start of Transition phase.
Tooling licenses (Cloud ALM, Focused Run) in place at Go-Live.
outOfScope: Functional application support (covered by separate AO team).

products.name: SAP S/4HANA
products.description: Flagship next-gen ERP, on-premise and cloud.
